stories.title: LeBron says he's not ready to reveal next team
stories.summary: LeBron James remains undecided about where he'll play this season. The NBA's all-time scoring leader and current free agent spoke Thursday but didn't reveal his next team choice.

stories.title: Messi to critics: Nothing was handed to Argentina
stories.summary: Lionel Messi has a message for Argentina's detractors: "Nothing was handed to us."

stories.title: Suber leads after the first round of his first Ope...
stories.summary: Jackson Suber leads after the first round of his first Open Championship.

stories.title: UM did not discuss AD Manuel's future at meeting
stories.summary: The University of Michigan's board of regents did not discuss the future of athletic director Warde Manuel during a Thursday meeting.

stories.title: Ream: U.S. in 'shock' at poor showing in WC exit
stories.summary: USMNT captain Tim Ream said he and his teammates were in "shock" following their poor performance in exiting the 2026 World Cup at the hands of Belgium.
